questions.question:
Purpose of a start bit in \(\text{RS-232}\) serial communication protocol is:

(GATE CSE 1997)
options:
A.

to synchronize receiver for receiving every byte

B.

to synchronize receiver for receiving a sequence of bytes

D.

to synchronize receiver for receiving the last byte
questions.correct_answer:
A.

to synchronize receiver for receiving every byte
questions.explanation: Click here for detail solution by gateoverflow
